title: Supreme Court denies relief to INC's Pawan Khera in Assam Police FIR; asks him to move Gauhati HC
description: The Supreme Court on Friday declined to extend the transit anticipatory bail earlier granted by the Telangana High Court to Congress leader Pawan Khera in a defamation and forgery case registered against him by the Assam Police.A Bench of Justices JK Maheshwari and AS Chandurkar advised Khera to approach the Gauhati High Court for relief. "You go and file a petition in Assam. The court will take up," the Bench said. The Court proceeded to close an application filed by Khera to oppose a stay orde
